stemHtml:
Refer to figure or ALICANTE - charts 19-1, 19-2 and 19-3 from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
A VFR flight which intends to land at Alicante aerodrome (LEAL) is currently overhead VFR report point SE, following the Tabarca route to intercept the South Route. The airport is busy with IFR departures and arrivals. ATC informs the VFR flight to expect delays.Where is the VFR traffic expected to hold?

options.a: Overhead VFR reporting point SE prior to entering the ATZ.
options.b: Published holding overhead ATE/VOR as determined by Alicante APP.
options.c: Overhead VFR reporting point S as established by Alicante TWR.
options.d: Published holding overhead ALT/VOR as determined by Alicante APP.
